---
id: processes-a-subscription-callback
title: "Processes a subscription callback"
description: "Processes a JWT-encoded subscription callback to update user subscription status. This endpoint does not require API key authentication — it uses JWT tokens for verification."
sidebar_label: "Processes a subscription callback"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/dawarich-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Processes a subscription callback"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/subscriptions/callback"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Processes a JWT-encoded subscription callback to update user subscription status. This endpoint does not require API key authentication — it uses JWT tokens for verification.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
